name: GitHub API documentation Q&A with web search and AI
description: Answers questions about the GitHub API by searching for relevant documentation via Exa, scraping the results with Firecrawl, and synthesizing answers with Claude AI. Posts the Q&A to Slack. Adapted from n8n's RAG-powered GitHub API chatbot workflow.

source.originalName: Chat with GitHub API documentation: RAG-powered chatbot with Pinecone & OpenAI

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for searching GitHub docs

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping doc pages

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting answers

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for Q&A responses

question.description: Question about the GitHub API (e.g. 'How do I create a pull request via the API?')

steps.name: Build search query for GitHub docs
Search Exa for relevant GitHub documentation
Scrape top documentation pages with Firecrawl
Build Slack Block Kit Q&A response
